codeReceipt.routing: The prompt 'what needs my attention' routes to triageInbox in both the local fallback and Anthropic gateway preloader.
rankingRules: client_inquiry: leak, pool, spa, schedule, appointment, estimate, quote, repair, service, technician, reply, water-loss, or client question language
form_submission: new lead, contact form, website form, quote request, estimate request, WPForms/Gravity Forms language
service_notice: Jobber, CompanyCam, Stripe, Railway, Firebase, Google Cloud, WordPress, domain, billing, subscription, receipt, security, audit, verification, failed/action-required language
noise excluded: spam/trash/promotions/social labels plus unsubscribe/newsletter/promo/sale/coupon/deal/webinar language

liveTranscriptRedacted.auth: Firebase custom token minted in-memory under Railway staging env; token not printed or stored
